data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies user choices to improve decision-making speed.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined navigation and minimized options per screen.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs interactive elements that are easy to click or tap.
data.technical_spec: Large, easily clickable/tappable buttons and links.

data.title: Visual Hierarchy
data.description: Emphasizes important elements to guide user attention.
data.technical_spec: Contrast, size, and positioning to establish hierarchy.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Uses visual grouping to enhance perception and comprehension.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Prioritizes both functionality and pleasing design.
data.technical_spec: Balanced color schemes, intuitive design elements.
